feat.name: Snare Expert
feat.text: Your knowledge of traps aids you in defending your hideout. You gain the Snare Crafting feat. When you set a snare, any saving throw it requires uses the higher of your class DC or the snare's DC. Snares you set within your favored location increase their Stealth DC by 2.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
